_comment: Documentation manifest, enforced by scripts/check-docs.mjs. `required` files must exist. Every env var the code consumes (a process.env.X use, or a Zod config-schema key in `configFiles` if this repo had one) must appear in .env.example unless listed in `envIgnore` (runtime/CI-injected vars that are deliberately not documented). A new config surface added without documenting it fails the gate. This repo is a stateless passthrough with no Zod config schema, so `configFiles` is empty and the env surface is discovered entirely from process.env uses in src/.
